Transcrição Completa: Day 24 - Power of Props & Physical Prospecting

 

Conversa

 

[00:00] "So hopefully at this point in your prospecting your follow-up cycles that you are in the communication cycles of every single day disciplining yourself to hit at least 100 and now because you have all that momentum you're catching up on all the communication that you probably initially missed because you didn't have the discipline to hit that daily 100."

 

[00:20] "So once again hit an extremely high number every day. Hopefully you're getting past 100. Hopefully you're getting more efficient. Get a VA, a virtual assistant. Hire them and get them in real time to go out and build lead lists for you as long as you direct them to what type of lead list you want build."

 

[00:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "The Power of Props"

 

NÚMEROS: 100+ diários de prospecção

 

VISUAL: Conceito de usar objetos físicos para prospecting, estratégia de diferenciação em outreach

 

[00:42] "The power of props. And when I say that, if you have physical addresses for these people, whether it be their business or not, and you know the decision makers names, you're going to send weird things to people."

 

[00:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Baseball Bat Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: $5-20 investimento total por envio ($10 bat + $5-10 shipping)

 

VISUAL: Taco de baseball com mensagem escrita à mão em Sharpie, estratégia de envio físico para decisores

 

[00:57] "So, you can go to your local sporting goods store and you can buy things like bats. Yes, that's right. Bats. And the reason that I want you to go there, like a baseball bat, is because you're going to buy ones that are either made out of wood or plain ones and you're going to get a Sharpie and you're going to want to sign them."

 

[01:15] "So, typically an aluminum bat, you know, can work. I prefer the wood bats. You can also do these things by ordering them on Amazon and getting a few shipped to your house on Prime, right? And get a Sharpie with it. Few bucks, maybe 10 bucks each. I don't know, five, 10 bucks to ship. So all in all, maybe you're 10, $15, $20 invested here on the shipment to this thing."

 

[01:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Bat Message Script"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Mensagem escrita em taco: "Excited to hit it out of the park" + número de telefone + informações básicas de contato

 

[01:37] "Here's what you're going to write on the bat and a Sharpie. You're going to say things like, 'Excited to hit it out of the park. It's a cheesy way to get your attention. Can we talk tomorrow morning or afternoon about digital marketing?' And then you're going to put dash and you're going to sign it your phone number on it and then print right underneath it either your name and your company name or just very basic information, not all your contact information."

 

[02:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Advanced ClickFunnels Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Estratégia avançada: URL no taco → ClickFunnels page → Video audit personalizado, criando curiosidade sem revelar identidade inicialmente

 

[02:07] "You could also take it a step further since ClickFunnels is so simple, right? Maybe you also create a little curiosity here and you don't put your name. Maybe you just put a website link that's very simple and on a ClickFunnels page, you have a video there where you have a video audit that you've done for them and you're a little bit further into your closing cycle now, right?"

 

[02:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Bat Message Variations"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Variações de mensagens: "hit it out of the park", "hit a home run", "hit a grand slam" - todas relacionadas ao tema do taco de baseball

 

[02:32] "So once again, the process here, get some physical bats, put a note on it like excited to hit it out of the park with you. Excited to hit a home run. Excited to hit a grand slam. There's bats to represent us hitting it out of the park. Stuff like that. Real cheesy."

 

[02:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Advanced Funnel Strategy Message"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Mensagem no taco: URL + "I have something for you on this website... It's not spam, lol" → ClickFunnels page customizada

 

[02:50] "And then on that bat, once again, you're going to want to write, in this case, if you're doing the advanced side, a website URL and say, I have something for you on this website dot dot dot. It's not spam, lol. And put the actual URL that you've created and put a Click Funnels page on."

 

[03:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ClickFunnels Page Structure"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Layout da página: Logo do prospect no topo, seu logo + logo deles, vídeo audit, formulário com CTA copy abaixo

 

[03:10] "That is just a very simple page, right? Video. You can put their logo at the top of the page. You can put your logo plus their logo. It's a good way to put it. You can have that video and then right below there you can have a simple form with call to action copy."

 

[03:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Funnel Scripts Tool"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Ferramenta para criar headlines rapidamente, link disponível na descrição

 

[03:27] "I would recommend using tools like funnel scripts. It's a great tool in order to create simple headlines on the fly after you're typing tools in in real time. We have a link for you below for that as well in case you want to actually get in on it. So there's actually a clickable link down below."

 

[03:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Battery Pack Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Pack de baterias como prop físico, pode adicionar sticky notes, escrever na embalagem

 

[03:47] "Anyway, you can also do things like sending out batteries to people, like packs of batteries. It's actually one of the reasons we have that here. Obviously for all the sound equipment, things like that. But we'll actually use this as a prop. What we'll do, actually send out a literal pack of batteries."

 

[04:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Battery Message Script"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Mensagem nas baterias: "recharge all your digital marketing efforts" + agendamento ou URL do funnel

 

[04:07] "So, you can write on the back of this. You can also add sticky notes. You can do whatever you want. You get the idea. You're going to write a note on this. Once again, super cheesy. Wanted to send you a pack of batteries to represent that we're going to recharge all your digital marketing efforts and get more results. I wanted you to pick a time in the morning or afternoon that we could chat. Or once again, you could do the funnel logic."

 

[04:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Creative Props Options"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Várias opções criativas: eggplants (sem pun ainda), bags of dirt, qualquer objeto que possa ter mensagem criativa

 

[04:32] "So, pick any prop. You could creatively think with this however you'd like. There's also companies that can send out eggplants to people. I just haven't creatively been able to come up with any puns for eggplants, but there's a lot a bunch of stuff. You know, you can send people bags of dirt. There's a lot of things that you can do once again on the internet to send people whatever it is that you'd like."

 

[04:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Day 24 Action Items"

 

NÚMEROS: Dia 24 do programa

 

VISUAL: Lista de ações: hit numbers, make it rain, close appointments, deliver results, legal protection, não falhar nos números

 

[04:57] "And you could do it creatively in any type of way in order to get a cheesy message across, in order to get attention. This is day 24. You need to go hit your numbers, get it up, make it rain, close some appointments, make sure you know how to deliver for all these people. Make sure you're legally protecting yourself as you're closing your deals. Make sure that you are not falling short of any numbers."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

100+ contatos diários de prospecção (mínimo)

$10-20 investimento por envio de prop físico

$10 por taco de baseball

$5-10 custo de envio

Dia 24 do programa de treinamento

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Power of Props Strategy: Usar objetos físicos para se destacar na prospecção

Baseball Bat Outreach: Enviar tacos com mensagens escritas à mão

Battery Pack Strategy: Enviar pilhas com mensagem de "recarregar" marketing

ClickFunnels Integration: Criar páginas personalizadas com video audits

Two-Tier Approach: Versão básica (contato direto) vs avançada (funnel com curiosidade)

VA Delegation: Contratar assistente virtual para construir lead lists

Creative Props Selection: Eggplants, bags of dirt, qualquer objeto com potencial criativo

 

ESTRUTURA:

Mensagem no Bat: "Excited to hit it out of the park" + número + nome/empresa

Variações de Mensagem: Home run, grand slam, hit it out of the park

Mensagem nas Baterias: "Recharge digital marketing efforts" + call to action

ClickFunnels Page Layout: Logo do prospect + seu logo → vídeo audit → formulário + CTA

Funnel Scripts: Tool para criar headlines rapidamente

Advanced Strategy: URL no prop → página customizada sem revelar identidade inicialmente

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Investimento por prop: $10-20 total

Custo do taco: ~$10

Custo de envio: $5-10

ROI potencial: Alto através de diferenciação e atenção garantida

 

DURAÇÃO: ~5 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo de treinamento prático - Day 24 de programa de prospecting
